'''Crystalboy''' was a past employer of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and one of several galactic big shots who owed Fett favors. Fett enlisted Crystalboy as a middleman when the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] used dummy corporations, fake identification, and forged requisition forms to repurchase the impounded [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']] as part of a "surplus liquidation" deal of assets from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] storage base on [[Grakouine]].<ref name="DESB" />
